/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/appLaikaStudio_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/applaikastudio_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_LaikaStudio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/appLaikaStudio_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/appLaikaStudio_Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appLaikaStudio.dir/.qt/rcc/qrc_appLaikaStudio_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o appLaikaStudio.app/Contents/MacOS/appLaikaStudio -F/Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib /Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtQuick /Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtQml.framework/Versions/A/QtQml /Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /Users/ian/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
